case_title: LLAMAS, RODOLFO et al vs. KIJANO, FLOR et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LLAMAS, RODOLFO LLAMAS, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT KIJANO, FLOR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT QUIJANO, FLOR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUIJANO, FLOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1343 SOUTH VAN NESS, 2ND BEDROOM, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WILL PAY DEFT $500- MOVING EXPENSES ON 3/31/97 AT TIME DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES. FAILURE TO VACATE DEFT TO PAY $990- FOR BACK RENT AND FORFEITS THE $500- MOVING EXPENSES. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. IF DEFT COMMITS 2 NUISANCE TYPE CONDUCT, PLTF MAY SEEK EARLIER EVICTION. SEE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GNEISER, DOUGLAS TODD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR QUIJANO, FLOR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT QUIJANO, FLOR
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

#3 JUDGE: GEORGE CHOPPELAS; M. BRADY/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK 2:50PM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF RODOLFO LLAMAS PRESENT WITH COUNSEL STEVEN LITTMAN, PLTF MARIA LLAMAS NOT PRESENT; COUNSEL DOUGLAS T. GNEISER SPECIALLY APPEARING WITH DEFT FLOR QUIJANO. SPANISH INTERPRETER CARIDAD FRUTOS, FROM DEF COUNSEL'S OFFICE PRESENT TO INTERPRET FOR DEFT. COURT AMENED PLEADINGS ON ITS FACE TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF THE DEFT, FLOR QUIJANO AND THE ADDRESS TO 2ND BEDROOM ONLY. CASE SETTLED AND THE JUDGMENT PURS TO STIPULATION READ INTO THE RECORD. ALL PARTIES AGREED TO THE TERMS AND THE JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES PRESENT IN OPEN COURT.
